name: Cock-a-Leekie (Chicken and Leek Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat all ingredients except leeks to boiling in a Dutch oven.
2. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Add leeks and return to boil. Reduce heat and continue simmering until chicken is cooked through, about 15 minutes.
4. Remove chicken from broth and cool slightly.
5. Remove chicken from bones and skin; cut into 1-inch pieces.
6. Skim fat from both the broth and the chicken pieces.
7. Remove bay leaf.
8. Add chicken back to the broth and heat until hot, about 5 minutes.
